title: Ravenhead Entertain Set of 4 Beer Glasses 53cl
features: STYLISH GLASSWARE | Made with you and your lifestyle in mind, the Entertain Set 4 Beer glasses are perfect for those times when you want to party, entertain or just enjoy the company of friends. Create a modern look, enjoy the atmosphere and entertain in style.
TAKING CARE | These beer glasses are dishwasher safe. Please wash before first use.
SIZE | Each beer glass measures 53 centilitres. Please note this item comes as a pack of four.

ENTERTAIN |The Entertain Range includes an extensive collection of specialist cocktail glasses in a variety of shapes and sizes. From contemporary oversized gin balloons to traditional cocktail saucers, these glasses are perfect for presenting an array of cocktail creations.

THE RAVENHEAD STORY | Ravenhead dates back to a factory based at St Helens in North West England in 1842, an area renowned for its glassmaking. Primarily producing bottles, Ravenhead in the 1930s branched out into domestic tableware such as bowls, jugs and drinking glasses.
